pr.title: Simulated Product Adapter (Adapter 000): in-memory model behind the bridge interface (B6)
pr.description:
## Summary Adapter 000 lets capabilities validate with zero Revit (and zero license). New `src/axiom_core/simulated_adapter.py`: - `SimulatedModel` — deterministic in-memory model (seed: 3 Walls + 2 Doors with Text `Comments`/`Mark` params plus one read-only param to exercise safety gates). - `SimulatedPipeClient` — same surface as `PipeClient` (`is_available()` / `execute_tool(tool_name, args, simulate, step_id, transaction_name) -> ToolResult`), so it injects straight into the existing `execute_capability_via_bridge(pipe_client=...)` driver and produces **real bridge evidence bundles** (`bridge_request.json` / `bridge_response.json` / `pass_fail.json` / summary md). Supported capabilities mirror Adapter 001's contract and doctrine: - `CreateGrids` — numeric + alphabetic grids per the registry schema; rejects `SpacingFeet <= 0`. - `CreateLevels` — uniform (`FloorToFloorFeet`) or `VariableElevationsFeet` + `LevelNames`, with length-mismatch validation. - `InventoryModel` — **summary mode only**: counts + category breakdown + source model, never a parameter dump (same safety rule as live inventory); supports `CategoryFilter`. - `SetParameterValue` — category-constrained, Text/writable/instance parameters only, **hard cap 5 elements**, preview by default; `Mode: "apply"` required to mutate (`modified_ids` empty on preview). Anti-overclaim (fidelity doctrine): every `ToolResult.output_data` is stamped `adapter: "simulated-000"`, `simulated_model: true`, and it flows into the persisted bridge evidence — simulated evidence can never be mistaken for live-Revit proof. The registry note repeats this. CLI: `axiom simulated-adapter-run --capability [--args-json ] [--output-dir

] [--json-output]` (fresh seed model per invocation; non-pass classification exits 1). Registry entry (READ_ONLY/SAFE) + `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`; `revit-adapter` skill documents Adapter 000 in the same PR. **Stacked on #70** (merge order: #70 → this). What did NOT change: `automation_bridge`, `pipe_client`, capability registry schemas, any live-Revit path. Tests (tier 2, targeted): `tests/test_simulated_adapter.py` — 23 tests covering the client contract, all four capabilities (including safety failures: spacing/count validation, hard cap, missing category, read-only param rejection, preview non-mutation), bridge evidence bundle on disk, seed determinism, CLI JSON/failure exits; `tests/test_command_registry.py` 27 passed; ruff clean. Real CLI smoke: CreateGrids (6 created) and SetParameterValue apply (2 modified) both `pass` with evidence bundles written. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7 Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
